_comment: Per-consumer declaration of copy-distributed runnables (ADR-20260524 §3.1). Copy this file into the consuming repo (e.g. tools/copy-parity.config.json), list every kit runnable the repo carries as a verbatim copy, and pass its path to the reusable workflow's parity-config-path input. 'adapted' entries declare a bounded adaptation (upstream-protocol canon §6.1) — visible, never silently skipped.

adapted.reason: EXAMPLE ONLY — declare the concrete reason for the divergence and keep the do-not-overwrite list in the per-fork UPSTREAM.md
